$comment: Companion-tool manifest for any mod manager / launcher that wants
to surface a 'Launch Tool' button on a mod's page. Shipped alongside
the mod in the release zip; intentionally minimal and human-readable.
Format proposal — not a standard yet. If the mercs2-modkit team wants
to define an official schema, this entry should be straightforward to
adapt. Treat as a starting point for that conversation.
name        : human-readable label for the button
executable  : path relative to this manifest's directory; the
launcher just runs it (no args required)
requires    : free-form notes — e.g. another mod that has to be
installed for the tool to be useful

tools.name: Lua Console
tools.description: Tabbed Lua IDE with syntax highlighting, persistent output panel, and live bridge status indicator. Connects to 127.0.0.1:27050.
tools.requires: Merc2Fix.asi (full build) or the lua-bridge mod must be installed and the game must be running for the console to do anything useful.
